title: agropyron palmeri
intro: Agropyron palmeri, also known as Palmer's wheatgrass or cheatgrass, is a species of grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron palmeri include reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Agropyron palmeri can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or supplement, and is also used as a nutritional additive in foods and beverages.
